content.text:
перепиши @echo off
echo =============================================
echo         Select model to start
echo =============================================
echo.
echo 1. Ornith 35B
echo 2. Ornith 9B
echo 3. Qwen 3.6 (text)
echo 4. Qwen 3.6 (with images)
echo 5. Qwen 3.6 (lm-km)
echo.
set /p choice=Enter number (1-5): 

if "%choice%"=="1" goto ornith35
if "%choice%"=="2" goto ornith9
if "%choice%"=="3" goto qwen36
if "%choice%"=="4" goto qwen36img
if "%choice%"=="5" goto qwen36lm_km

echo Invalid choice!
pause
exit

:ornith35
echo.
echo --- Starting Ornith 35B (Native Windows + CUDA) ---
echo Loading model, please wait...
echo.
build\bin\Release\llama-server.exe ^
  -m "C:\Users\igorp\.lmstudio\models\deepreinforce-ai\Ornith-1.0-35B-GGUF\ornith-1.0-35b-Q4_K_M.gguf" ^
  --port 8081 ^
  --no-mmproj ^
  --no-mmap ^
  --host 0.0.0.0 ^
  -ctk q8_0 ^
  -ctv q8_0 ^
  --n-cpu-moe 34 ^
  --flash-attn on ^
  -ngl 99 ^
  --jinja ^
  -c 128000 ^
  -b 2048 ^
  -ub 512 ^
  -t 4 ^
  -tb 4 ^
  --temp 0.7 ^
  --top-p 0.95 ^
  --top-k 20 ^
  --min-p 0.0 ^
  --presence-penalty 0.0 ^
  --repeat-penalty 1.0
exit

:ornith9
echo.

echo Loading model, please wait...
echo.
build\bin\Release\llama-server.exe ^
